comments.body: @rhatdan I wonder if we could move this package over to c/common as Buildah and Podman are using it.

LGTM but want a lgtm from @giuseppe or @nalind 
@vrothberg feels like a common package to me too, but would like to hear from others too.

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *giuseppe*, *vrothberg* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fbuildah). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [giuseppe,vrothberg] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
I am fine with moving this over to containers/common,  I would guess there is a possibility of CRI-O using it also.
